---
layout: none
permalink: /projects/navy
include: "n"
---


<!-- <!DOCTYPE html> -->
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Navy Yard Shuttle Ticket</title>
<style>
  :root {
    --ink: #14171c;
    --teal: #2fb89c;
    --paper: #ffffff;
    --muted: #6b7280;
    --hairline: #e6e7e9;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; }
  html, body {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    background: #ffffff;
    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
    color: var(--ink);
  }
  .phone {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    margin: 0;
    background: var(--paper);
    border-radius: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
  .back-row {
    background: var(--ink);
    color: #fff;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 22px 22px 20px;
    font-size: 26px;
  }
  .help-circle {
    width: 34px;
    height: 34px;
    border: 1.5px solid #fff;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 600;
  }
  .content {
    padding: 28px 26px 10px;
  }
  h1 {
    font-size: 30px;
    margin: 0 0 6px;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    color: #333333
  }
  .subtitle {
    font-size: 17px;
    color: #3c3f45;
    margin: 0 0 30px;
  }
  .ring-wrap {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    margin: 6px 0 34px;
  }
  .ring {
    width: 220px;
    height: 220px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--ink);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .ring-inner {
    width: 165px;
    height: 165px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--paper);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .ring-inner .navy {
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 20px;
    line-height: 1.15;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }
  .ring-inner .city {
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--teal);
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-top: 4px;
  }
  .ring-logo {
    width: 220px;
    height: 220px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
  }
  .clock {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 62px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin: 4px 0 26px;
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  }
  .card {
    margin: 0 26px 26px;
    border: 1px solid var(--hairline);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 26px 24px;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.03);
  }
  .card h2 {
    font-size: 26px;
    margin: 0 0 8px;
    color: #333333
  }
  .card .loc {
    font-size: 17px;
    color: #3c3f45;
    margin: 0 0 26px;
  }
  .card .expires {
    font-size: 19px;
    font-weight: 700;
  }
  .tz-note {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--muted);
    padding-bottom: 22px;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="phone">
  <div class="back-row">
    <span>&#8249;</span>
    <span class="help-circle">?</span>
  </div>

  <div class="content">
    <h1>Navy Yard Shuttle</h1>
    <p class="subtitle">Show operator your ticket</p>

    <div class="ring-wrap">
      <img class="ring-logo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Navy Yard Philadelphia">
    </div>

    <div class="clock" id="liveClock">--:--:-- --</div>
  </div>

  <div class="card">
    <h2>Adult 1 Ride</h2>
    <p class="loc">Philadelphia, PA</p>
    <div class="expires" id="expiresLine">Expires --</div>
  </div>

  <p class="tz-note">Times shown in US Eastern Time</p>
</div>

<script>
  function formatTime(date) {
    return date.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {
      timeZone: 'America/New_York',
      hour: 'numeric',
      minute: '2-digit',
      second: '2-digit',
      hour12: true
    });
  }

  function formatStatusTime(date) {
    return date.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {
      timeZone: 'America/New_York',
      hour: 'numeric',
      minute: '2-digit',
      hour12: false
    });
  }

  function getEasternParts(date) {
    const parts = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US', {
      timeZone: 'America/New_York',
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'short',
      day: 'numeric'
    }).formatToParts(date);
    const obj = {};
    parts.forEach(p => obj[p.type] = p.value);
    return obj; // {year, month, day}
  }

  function updateClock() {
    const now = new Date();

    // Live ticking clock in US Eastern time
    document.getElementById('liveClock').textContent = formatTime(now);

    // Expiration: always "today" (Eastern calendar date) at 8:00 AM
    const { month, day, year } = getEasternParts(now);
    document.getElementById('expiresLine').textContent =
      `Expires ${month} ${day}, ${year} at 8:00 AM`;
  }

  updateClock();
  setInterval(updateClock, 1000);
</script>

</body>
</html>
